title: Thelypteris ensipinna
taxonomy: Thelypteris ensipinna belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae, which is a part of the division Pteridophyta. This plant is further classified under the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. The species Thelypteris ensipinna is a type of fern, characterized by its distinctive leaf shape and habitat. It is native to certain regions of Central and South America. The classification of Thelypteris ensipinna reflects its evolutionary relationships and unique characteristics within the plant kingdom.

The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and wounds.
